properties.avoid: Redosing/double dosing the drug. It is recommended to avoid all other amphetamines.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: A rare psychedelic amphetamine of the same class as DOM. This is a powerful potent psychedelic with all the effects you would expect from an amphetamine. Described by Shulgin as a 'heavy duty psychedelic'. Analogue of 2C-P.
